zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Mallory於1523年出生在英國越可爾赫頓 康聶爾斯時，她的父親Sir William Mallory IV26歲，母親Jane Norton34歲。她於1545年與Sir George Bowes在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年7月1日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Mallory于1523年出生在英国越可爾赫頓 康聶爾斯时，她的父亲Sir William Mallory IV26岁，母亲Jane Norton34岁。她于1545年与Sir George Bowes在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年7月1日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Mallory was born in 1523, in Hutton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William Mallory IV, was 26 and her mother, Jane Norton, was 34. She married Sir George Bowes in 1545, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 1 July 1558.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Mallory est née en 1523, à Hutton Conyers, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Mallory IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane Norton, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Bowes en 1545, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1 juillet 1558.

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Mallory(이)가 1523년 영국 요르크실르 후턴 코니어스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Mallory IV(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Norton(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir George Bowes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 7월 1일 이전 사망했다.
